title: Repository Baseline, Node 24, TypeScript 7, Compatibility, and Reproduction
description: The prototype floats Node and TypeScript versions, confuses native TypeScript 7 CLI support with TypeScript 6 programmatic API compatibility, relies on generated residue, and lacks clean-install evidence. Learners cumulatively produce reproducible strict TypeScript Pokedex repository through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect revision, worktree, package metadata, lockfile, configuration inheritance, tests, fixtures, secrets, licenses, and recovery anchor.
Record supported Node 24 release, module system, platform, built-in fetch and readline surfaces, signal behavior, and package-manager contract.
Use TypeScript 7 CLI deliberately while retaining the documented TypeScript 6 compatibility package where programmatic tooling still requires it.
